header: Three gates between every release and your production site
subheadline: No Desiderio version ships until static analysis, the template audit, and the full test suite all pass — your safety net, maintained by us.

items.title: PHPStan level max
items.description: The entire codebase is statically analyzed at the strictest level on every single change.

items.title: 11-category template audit
items.description: Zero tolerance for inline styles or hardcoded colors across all 255 element templates.

items.title: 400 tests on PHP 8.3 and 8.4
items.description: Unit and functional PHPUnit suites run against both PHP versions before every merge.
